title: Proclamation No. 2101, s. 2010
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 2101

DECLARING FRIDAY, JULY 2, 2010, AS SPECIAL (NON-WORKING) DAY IN THE CITY OF PASIG

WHEREAS , July 2, 2010 marks the celebration of the 437 th Foundation Day anniversary of the City of Pasig;

WHEREAS , it is but fitting and proper that the people of the City of Pasig be given full opportunity to celebrate the occasion with appropriate ceremonies.

NOW, THEREFORE, I, LEANDRO R. MENDOZA , Executive Secretary, by authority of Her Excellency, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO , do hereby declare Friday, July 2, 2010, as special (non-working) day in the City of Pasig.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF , I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 28th day of June, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Ten.

By authority of the President: (Sgd.) LEANDRO R. MENDOZA Executive Secretary

By the Executive Secretary: (Sgd.) AGUSTIN S. DIZON Deputy Executive Secretary for Legal Affairs

Source : CDAsia
